[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Wed Apr 23, 2008 8:48 am wow, awesome. a lot of music there. i actually got the rebuild soundtrack a while ago in my rabid search for the movie. shiro sagisu's great. i think a lot of people overlook him and his score when taking eva as a whole into consideration. seriously, what would eva be without Decisive Battle or Cruel Dillemna? also, Angels of Doom off the rebuild album is an awesome song.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 23, 2008 1:31 pm Nitpick: Rebuild of Evangelion - EVANGELION 1.0 YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE Single - Tamashii no Refrain
